title: Vietnamese Noodle Salad
description: A refreshing and healthy salad made with Vietnamese noodles, energizing ingredients, and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: Cook the Vietnamese noodles according to package instructions.
Chop the celery into thin slices.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, chopped celery, and mint leaves.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, sesame oil, lime juice, salt, and pepper.
Pour the dressing over the noodle mixture and toss to combine.
Serve immediately and garnish with additional mint leaves if desired.
